title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at ITC Hotels - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ITC Hotels! We are hiring a Reservation Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ITC Hotels:
ITC Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Hotels!
